text.tspan: Unmet need for contraception among married women of reproductive
Fertile, married women of reproductive age (ages 15-49) who do not want to become pregnant and are not using
Data source: Demographic and Health Surveys (DHS), Multiple Indicator Cluster Surveys (MICS), and United Nations Population Division,
